# Ella Core Documentation

> A 5G mobile core network for private deployments - easy to operate, reliable, and secure.

A 5G mobile core network for private deployments - easy to operate, reliable, and secure.

## Home

- [Home](https://docs.ellanetworks.com/index.md)

## Tutorials

- [Tutorials](https://docs.ellanetworks.com/tutorials/index.md)

- [Getting Started: Simulated 5G Network](https://docs.ellanetworks.com/tutorials/getting_started_simulation/index.md)

- [Tune Network Performance](https://docs.ellanetworks.com/how_to/performance_tuning/index.md)
